gate: M2.3 AI Retarget cache, persistence, and cron

implemented: LeadCohort Prisma model mapped to lead_cohorts
24h active cache lookup using expiresAt > now
Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 cohort reasoning path with deterministic fallback when key is missing
Reasoning prompt includes criteria, anonymized sample leads, funded history aggregate, counts, and capacity

LeadCohort snapshot stores user, cohort type, title, description, query JSON, source attribution, predicted reply rate, expected funded, historical anchor, AI reasoning, counts, cap metadata, warnings, sample leads, lead ids, and expiry
15 minute AI cohort cron connected to server startup and graceful shutdown
Cron runs across active ADMIN, MANAGER, and REP users and isolates failures per user/cohort
AI Build Campaign button opens the existing campaign modal with cohort name, message, and resolved lead set preloaded
AI modal submit calls the AI cohort build endpoint so campaign lineage is preserved
Campaigns v3 prototype retained-scope compare passed for AI Retarget Suggestions, three cohort cards, All Campaigns, AI badge, lineage marker, and no scope-creep blocks
notClaimed: Full shell-wide pixel-perfect match is not claimed because the retained M2 scope is the Campaigns AI Retarget section, not the whole app chrome
Full live authenticated admin/rep AI cohort browser smoke remains open until production credentials are available

focusedTests.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/campaignAiCohorts.test.ts tests/aiCohortCron.test.ts
notes: Redis ECONNREFUSED warnings are expected in local focused tests and did not fail the suite

mockedBrowserSmoke.tooling: VS Code browser + Playwright route mocks

campaignActionsRegressionSmoke.tooling: VS Code browser + Playwright route mocks

retargetActionRegressionSmoke.tooling: VS Code browser + Playwright route mocks

productionDeploySmoke.schemaApproach: Prisma db push stopped on unrelated varchar data-loss warnings; did not use --accept-data-loss. Created only the additive lead_cohorts table with manual SQL.

checks.apiHealth: https://app.sclcapital.io/api/health returned status ok with database ok and redis ok

campaignsPrototypeScopeSmoke.tooling: VS Code browser + Playwright route mocks + saved screenshots

assertions: active LeadCohort reasoning is reused
AIService.generateCohortReasoning is not called on cache hit
lead sample query is skipped on cache hit
expired cohorts are ignored by expiresAt > now lookup
Anthropic reasoning input includes funded history and anonymized sample leads
24h LeadCohort snapshot is written with criteria, counts, cap metadata, warnings, sample leads, and lead ids
active users are selected by role ADMIN/MANAGER/REP
refresh continues after one user failure
summary records attempted, refreshed, and failure counts
Build Campaign opens Build AI Campaign modal
modal preloads cohort title, lead count, name, and message template
submit calls POST /api/campaigns/ai-cohorts/:cohortId/build
AI-built campaign appears in All Campaigns with AI badge and lineage marker
Start action calls existing start endpoint and updates status
Pause action calls existing pause endpoint and updates status
Cancel action confirms and calls existing cancel endpoint
Delete action confirms and removes the campaign from the list
Retarget action opens preview modal, confirms retarget endpoint, and shows lineage in All Campaigns
Prototype Campaigns tab contains retained Phase 3 AI Retarget section
Actual Campaigns page preserves AI Retarget Suggestions above All Campaigns
Actual page renders the three retained cohort types from the prototype
Actual page shows AI-built campaign badge and lineage marker in All Campaigns
Actual page avoids out-of-scope Suppressed Leads, List Management rebuild, and extra cohort bar

remainingM23Risks: Full live authenticated admin/rep AI cohort browser smoke still depends on production login credentials or OTP access
